_note: Genuine Ibn Kathīr al-Makkī (via al-Bazzī) farsh variants where Ḥafṣ and Warsh agree but Ibn Kathīr reads differently. idx = Ḥafṣ word index in the tokenised verse. Arabic forms come from the KFGQPC Bazzī ʿan Ibn Kathīr mushaf (verified via scripts/find_bazzi.py); farsh classification per Ibn al-Jazarī, al-Nashr fī al-qirāʾāt al-ʿashr. Seeded from the positions where Ibn Kathīr's reading coincides with Abū ʿAmr's (Basran/Meccan overlap), reusing those already-verified glosses. ~90 further skeleton-confirmed candidates remain (run find_bazzi.py) — curate with sourced glosses before adding.
cite: Bazzī ʿan Ibn Kathīr al-Makkī (KFGQPC mushaf); farsh per Ibn al-Jazarī, al-Nashr fī al-qirāʾāt al-ʿashr.

entries.shared: no intercession will be accepted from it (yuqbalu — masculine passive)
entries.bazzi: no intercession will be accepted from it (tuqbalu — feminine passive, agreeing with shafāʿa)

entries.shared: of what you do (taʿmalūn — 2nd person plural)
entries.bazzi: of what they do (yaʿmalūn — 3rd person plural)
they worship (yaʿbudūn — 3rd person plural)
then a pledge (ruhun — an alternative plural of rahn)
we teach him (nuʿallimuh — 1st person plural)

entries.shared: of what you do (taʿmalūn — 2nd person plural)
entries.bazzi: of what they do (yaʿmalūn — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: of what you do (taʿmalūn — 2nd person plural)
entries.bazzi: of what they do (yaʿmalūn — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: you will surely make it clear (la-tubayyinunnahu — 2nd person)
entries.bazzi: he will surely make it clear (la-yubayyinunnahu — 3rd person)
they conceal it (yaktumūnahū — 3rd person)
he supposes about them (yahsibunnahum — 3rd person with kasra)

entries.shared: you are wronged (tuẓlamūn — 2nd person plural passive)
entries.bazzi: they are wronged (yuẓlamūn — 3rd person plural passive)
of what they understand (yaʿqilūn — 3rd person)
they make it (yajʿalūnahū — 3rd person)
they reveal it (yubdūnahā — 3rd person)
and they conceal (wa-yakhfūn — 3rd person)
will be (takūn — 2nd person masculine singular)
of what they understand (yaʿqilūn — 3rd person)
of what they do (yaʿmalūna — 3rd person)

entries.shared: he may pasture and enjoy himself (yartaʿ — jussive, of Joseph)
entries.bazzi: we may pasture and enjoy ourselves (nartaʿ — the brothers, 1st-person plural)
and we may play (nalʿab)
We will (nashāʾu — 1st person plural, divine 'We')
of what they understand (yaʿqilūn — 3rd person)

entries.shared: that He should cause the shore to swallow you (yakhsifa — He)
entries.bazzi: that We should cause the shore to swallow you (nakhsifa — We)
or that We send against you (nursila — We)

entries.shared: He restores you (yuʿīdukum — 3rd person masculine, divine voice)
entries.bazzi: We restore you (nuʿīdukum — 1st person plural, divine 'We')

entries.shared: or He sends (yursil — 3rd person masculine, divine voice)
entries.bazzi: or We send (nursil — 1st person plural, divine 'We')

entries.shared: or He drowns you (yughriqakum — 3rd person masculine, divine voice)
entries.bazzi: or We drown you (nughriqakum — 1st person plural, divine 'We')

entries.shared: We will set them in motion (nusayyiruh — 1st person plural)
entries.bazzi: it will be set in motion (tusayyaru — passive form)
comes to them (yaʾtihim — masculine)

entries.shared: Did they not (awā lam — negative interrogative with wāw)
entries.bazzi: Did they not (alam — negative interrogative without wāw)
Allah repels / defends (yadfaʿu — form I)
they count (yaʿiddūn — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: striving to frustrate Our signs (muʿājizīn — form III)
entries.bazzi: seeking to thwart Our signs (muʿajjizīn — form II; sense is close)
blazes up (tawaqqada — form V)

entries.shared: and We sent down (wa-nuzzila — form II passive, 'was revealed')
entries.bazzi: and We send down (wa-nunzilu — form IV active, 'cause to descend'; present/habitual sense)
[they] hear (yasmaʿu — 3rd person)

entries.shared: of what you do (tafʿalūn — 2nd person plural)
entries.bazzi: of what they do (yafʿalūn — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: of what you do (taʿmalūn — 2nd person plural)
entries.bazzi: of what they do (yaʿmalūn — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: and he said (wa-qāla — with conjunction wāw)
entries.bazzi: he said (qāla — without conjunction wāw)
and We say (wa-naqūl — 1st person plural)
[they] hear (yasmaʿu — 3rd person)

entries.shared: will be doubled (yuḍāʿaf — form III passive)
entries.bazzi: We will double (nuḍaʿʿif — form II, 1st person plural)

entries.shared: you are promised (tūʿadūn — 2nd person plural passive)
entries.bazzi: they are promised (yūʿadūn — 3rd person plural passive)
it will avail (tanfaʿ — 3rd person feminine, grammatical gender agreement)

entries.shared: you desire it (tashtahīhi — 2nd person with attached object pronoun)
entries.bazzi: you desire (tashtahī — 2nd person without object pronoun)

entries.shared: you are returned (turjaʿūn — 2nd person plural passive)
entries.bazzi: they are returned (yurjaʿūn — 3rd person plural passive)
they believe (yuʾminū — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: and you honor him (wa-tuʿazzirūh — 2nd person plural)
entries.bazzi: and they honor him (wa-yuʿazzirūh — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: and you respect him (wa-tuwaqqirūh — 2nd person plural)
entries.bazzi: and they respect him (wa-yuwaqqirūh — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: and you glorify him (wa-tusabbihūh — 2nd person plural)
entries.bazzi: and they glorify him (wa-yusabbihūh — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: of what you do (taʿmalūn — 2nd person plural)
entries.bazzi: of what they do (yaʿmalūn — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: you are promised (tūʿadūn — 2nd person plural passive)
entries.bazzi: they are promised (yūʿadūn — 3rd person plural passive)
they believe (yuʾminūn — 3rd person plural)
they take heed (yadhakkarūn — 3rd person plural)
they love (yuhibbūn — 3rd person plural)
and they neglect (wa-yadhārūn — 3rd person plural)
they will (yashāʾūn — 3rd person plural)

entries.shared: you hear it (tasmaʿu — 2nd person singular active)
entries.bazzi: it is heard (yusmāʿu — 3rd person singular passive)
